name: Potato-Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 to 2 cups Frozen broccoli, chopped small
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the potatoes and set aside.
2. Sauté the onion and bacon together in a pot.
3. Add the potato pieces, water, bouillon cubes, and curry powder to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and reduce heat to a slow boil.
5. Cook for about 15 to 20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender and slide off a fork when tested.
6. Transfer the soup to a blender and blend until smooth.
7. Return the blended soup to the pot, mix in the milk and Worcestershire sauce, and add the broccoli.
8. Simmer slowly, stirring occasionally, for about 15 to 20 minutes.
9. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Makes 4 to 6 servings, depending on how hungry you are.
